steps.title: Identify the slope as the key factor
steps.content: The function $F(x) = \frac{9}{5}(x - 273.15) + 32$ is linear. For a linear function, the change in output depends only on the slope and the change in input—not on the constants. The slope is $\frac{9}{5}$.

steps.title: Apply the slope principle
steps.content:
For a linear function with slope $m$, an input change of $\Delta x$ produces an output change of $m \times \Delta x$. Since temperature increased by \$9.10$ kelvins:

$$\Delta F = \frac{9}{5} \times 9.10$$
